name: Sale Stickers
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can add sale stickers to product cards to highlight discounted items and promotional pricing, making special offers more visible to customers browsing your store. "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "These visual indicators help draw attention to deals and can create urgency, encouraging customers to take advantage of limited-time offers."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Implementing sale stickers with dynamic messaging like \"On Sale,\" \"X% off,\" or \"Save $X\" provides clear value signals that can help improve click-through rates and conversion on discounted products. "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By automatically displaying these badges based on price comparisons, you create a more engaging shopping experience that helps customers quickly identify the best deals, supporting your promotional merchandising strategy."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This documentation provides step-by-step instructions for adding sale stickers to product cards in a Shopify store using Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify). These stickers will help highlight discounted products with various messages like \"On Sale\", \"x% off\", and \"Save $x\"."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/27ITVTDJMQYR/52fa776-sale-sticker.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/27ITVTDJMQYR/52fa776-sale-sticker.png", "name": "52fa776-Sale_Sticker.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 155907, "width": 469, "height": 799, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F27ITVTDJMQYR%2F52fa776-sale-sticker.png", "mediaID": 1067, "dateInserted": "2025-10-06T21:36:59+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Prepare the Product Data"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "First, we need to add the logic to identify when a product is on sale. This involves comparing the product's price with its original price (compare_at_price)."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Open the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-product-card.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file in your theme's code editor."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Add the following code snippet to prepare the necessary product data:"}]}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{%- liquid if use_variant assign target = product.selected_or_first_available_variant else assign target = product endif assign price = target.price assign compare_at_price = target.compare_at_price%}", "code": true}], "lang": "cmake"}], "lang": "cmake"}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 2: Display the Sale Sticker"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Next, add the code to display the appropriate sale sticker based on the comparison of the product prices. You have three options for the sticker text:"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Option 1: \"On Sale\" Sticker"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{% comment %} Option 1. 'On Sale' text {% endcomment %}{% if compare_at_price > price %}
On Sale
{% endif %}", "code": true}]}], "lang": "twig"}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Option 2: \"x% off\" Sticker"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{% comment %} Option 2. 'x% off' {% endcomment %}{% if compare_at_price > price %} {% assign discount_percentage = compare_at_price | minus: price | times: 100.0 | divided_by: compare_at_price | round %}
{{ discount_percentage }}% off
{% endif %}", "code": true}]}], "lang": "twig"}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Option 3: \"Save $x\" Sticker"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{% comment %} Option 3. 'Save $x' {% endcomment %}{% if compare_at_price > price %} {% assign amount_saved = compare_at_price | minus: price %}
Save {{ amount_saved | money }}
{% endif %}", "code": true}]}], "lang": "twig"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can choose one of these options or include multiple ones based on your requirements."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 3: Style the Sale Sticker"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To ensure the sale stickers look good and are positioned correctly, you need to add some CSS styles."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Open the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-product-card.css", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file (or create it if it doesn't exist)."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Add the following CSS code to style the sale stickers:"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "CSS"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ".findify-sticker { position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 10px; background: #ff0000; /* Change the background color as needed */ color: #fff; font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 4px; border-radius: 4px; z-index: 10;}", "code": true}]}], "lang": "css"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This CSS will place the sale sticker at the top-right corner of the product card, with a red background and white text. Feel free to customize the styles to match your store's design."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For further assistance or inquiries, feel free to contact us on\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:YourFriends@Findify.io", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "YourFriends@Findify .io"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
